particulars.description: The leasehold property known as first and second floor premises and airspace above the buildings at 119-129 broadway, bexleyheath, DA6 7HF derived from title numbers K341 and K62501 and created by a lease dated 28 january 2021 between abc property five limited and permitted developments investments no 20 limited.

The leasehold property known as first and second floor premises and airspace above building at 119-129 broadway registered at the land registry out of title number K34162 and K62501 and demised by a lease of even date made between permitted developments investments no 20 limited (as landlord) and abc property five LTD (as tenant);.
